content:
# Layer By Layer Assembly

**Summary**: A technique to build up thin films by alternating layers of oppositely charged materials.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017]] used the layer-by-layer (LBL) assembly technique to coat fly ash with polyelectrolytes.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- One advantage of the LBL technique is that it is reproducible, robust, environmentally and cost friendly method. ([[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017, p. 30]])
